projects.project: GeoRMS Platform - Army Corps of Engineers
responsibilities: Designed and architected a geospatial analytics platform from scratch for the Army Corps of Engineers, creating a "Google Maps for waterway dredging" thats helping to transform national dredging project analysis and decision-making.

Leveraged LLMs throughout the full development lifecycle — from domain learning and data science fundamentals to architecture planning and implementation — compressing months of ramp-up across unfamiliar domains (dredging operations, Python/Pandas, React/Electron) into rapid, high-quality delivery.

Engineered a scalable ETL data pipeline in Python/Pandas to ingest, cleanse, and classify multifaceted operational data, including an ML-based classification algorithm, creating a unified queryable dataset for U.S. dredging operations.
Built a dynamic client-side aggregation engine within the Electron app that performs real-time statistical calculations, replacing days of manual analysis with immediate insights.
Authored the technical paper detailing the platform's data pipeline and application architecture for an ERDC publication.
Led development of a statewide asset management platform using Vue3 and C#/.NET on Azure, enabling management of billions of dollars in state assets and improving capital planning accuracy.
Optimized REST APIs and SQL (LINQ) query performance to reduce latency and accelerate simulation and budget forecasting workflows for state planners.
Engineered CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps/Docker) to automate the release lifecycle, eliminating manual deployments and improving uptime for state civil engineers.

experience.title: Senior Java Web Developer
responsibilities: Led migration of a monolithic legacy insurance platform to a containerized microservices architecture using Java and Spring Boot, increasing deployment frequency and developer productivity.
Architected and developed a secure, RESTful API-based payment processing system integrated with Authorize.NET, enabling frictionless premium payments.
Designed a unified web portal that integrated with legacy IBM i/DB2 systems, consolidating workflows and improving data integrity across business operations.

experience.title: Software Engineer in Test
responsibilities: Developed Python/Locust performance testing suites identifying critical bottlenecks and scalability issues.
Maintained and enhanced Cypress.js UI test automation framework for comprehensive QA coverage.
Led "one-man performance testing team" before transitioning to full-stack test automation role.

experience.title: Java Engineer
responsibilities: Engineered an internal performance testing automation platform using Java (Spring Boot) and Kubernetes, providing self-service capabilities to 50+ developers.
Automated test execution and streamlined results analysis via a central dashboard, reducing performance-related production bugs.

experience.title: Java Web Developer
responsibilities: Developed and maintained core backend features for primary policy and claims management applications, integrating with MSSQL and legacy IBM i systems.
Implemented a complex, Drools-based rating engine to automate underwriting rules, reducing manual data entry and processing.
